title: viburnum tiliifolium
intro: Viburnum tiliifolium, also known as Maple-leaved viburnum, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are believed to have various health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Additionally, Viburnum tiliifolium is sometimes used in folk medicine to reduce stress and promote relaxation.
